metaDescription.en: A brand woven with tradition and heritage. Shaping the name and visual soul of the coffee brand.
metaDescription.hr: Brend protkan tradicijom i baštinom. Oblikovanje imena i vizualne duše brenda kave.

breadcrumbSub.hr: Autorska prava, Brendiranje i Dizajn pakiranja

heading.en: A brand woven with tradition and heritage.

subtext.en: A quiet gratitude for being there at the beginning, shaping both the name and the visual soul of the coffee brand.
subtext.hr: Tiha zahvalnost što smo bili tamo na početku, oblikujući i ime i vizualnu dušu brenda kave.

text.en: 'NAVADA' - meaning: noun, feminine (Gen. sg. navade; pl. Nom. navade, Gen. navada) archaic: a custom; a way of life, work, or behavior that has become established within a human community and is transmitted from generation to generation. The term was accepted by the client as a brand name.
text.hr: 'NAVADA' - značenje: imenica, ženski rod (Gen. jd. navade; mn. Nom. navade, Gen. navada) arhaično: običaj; način života, rada ili ponašanja koji se ustalio u ljudskoj zajednici i prenosi se s koljena na koljeno. Izraz je klijent prihvatio kao naziv brenda.

text.en: The custom illustration 'Vrata Samobora' (The Gate of Samobor) by NAVADA brings together recognizable motifs of Samobor in a single composition. An arched gateway opens onto views of the Secession-style concrete bridge over the Gradna creek, the Church of St. Anastasia, and the fountain from King Tomislav Square, forming a visual narrative that connects tradition with the town's architectural symbols.
text.hr: Prilagođena ilustracija 'Vrata Samobora' tvrtke NAVADA objedinjuje prepoznatljive motive Samobora u jedinstvenu kompoziciju. Lučni prolaz otvara se prema pogledu na secesijski betonski most preko potoka Gradne, crkvu sv. Anastazije i fontanu s Trga kralja Tomislava, tvoreći vizualni narativ koji povezuje tradiciju s arhitektonskim simbolima grada.

primary.en: Primary Typography: Bangla MN - Regular - Font
primary.hr: Primarna tipografija: Bangla MN - Regular - Font

secondary.en: Secondary Typography: Noto Serif - Regular - Font

subtext.en: Julie Huebn: 'Samobor after a Photograph', lithograph, 1860 (from the I. Sudnik collection)
subtext.hr: Julie Huebn: 'Samobor prema fotografiji', litografija, 1860. (iz zbirke I. Sudnika)
